en.ahmedali: Will eat of the tree of Zaqqum,
en.ahmedraza: You will indeed eat from the Zaqqum tree.
en.arberry: you shall eat of a tree called Zakkoum,
en.daryabadi: Shall surely eat of the tree of Az-Zqqum.
en.hilali: "You verily will eat of the trees of Zaqqum.
en.itani: Will be eating from the Tree of Bitterness.
en.maududi: shall all eat from the Tree of al-Zaqqum,
en.mubarakpuri: "You verily, will eat of the trees of Zaqqum."
en.pickthall: Ye verily will eat of a tree called Zaqqum
en.qarai: will surely eat from the Zaqqum tree
en.qaribullah: you shall eat (the fruit) of the Tree of Zakkum.
en.sahih: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
en.sarwar: will eat from the fruit of the tree of Zaqqum,
en.shakir: Most surely eat of a tree of Zaqqoom,
en.wahiduddin: shall eat the fruit of the tree of Zaqqum,
en.yusufali: "Ye will surely taste of the Tree of Zaqqum.
fa.ansarian: قطعاً از درختی که از زقّوم است [و دارای مایعی جوشان و بسیار بدمزه و بدبوست] خواهید خورد؛
fa.bahrampour: قطعا از درختى كه از زقّوم است خواهيد خورد
fa.fooladvand: قطعاً از درختى كه از زقّوم است خواهيد خورد.
fa.ghomshei: از درخت زقّوم تلخ دوزخ البته خواهید خورد.
fa.khorramdel: قطعاً از درخت زقّوم خواهید خورد. [[«زَقُّومٍ»: (نگا: صافات / 62، دخان / 43).]]
fa.moezzi: همانا خورنده‌اید از درختی از زقّوم‌
fa.mojtabavi: هر آينه از درخت زقّوم مى‌خوريد،
fa.sadeqi: همواره از درختی (که) از زقّوم (است) خورندگانید.
